name: cybertaxonomy.eu
prose:
# EU BON UTIS API

The Unified Taxonomic Information Service (UTIS) is the taxonomic backbone for the EU-BON project

## Getting started

The EU BON UTIS API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `http://cybertaxonomy.eu/eu-bon/utis/1.0`.

## Authentication

No authentication is required to call this API.

## API reference

### GET /capabilities
capabilities
Returns a list of records.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /search
search
Returns a single record.
